name: richtext_form_example
description: Pict-section-form RichText InputType demo — markdown editor (edit mode) + rendered markdown (view mode), with pluggable image uploader

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>

ExampleApplication.Title: RichText Form Input
ExampleApplication.Summary: A pict-section-form field whose InputType is RichText — boots in view mode (rendered markdown), toggles into edit mode (CodeMirror) on demand. Demonstrates the AllowImages knob and the pluggable ImageUploader override.
